data.description:
The Overview board for the `work_sdlc` workflow currently hides terminal-state columns on first load. This change makes all columns visible by default, merges the three terminal states (Shipped, Deferred, Abandoned) into a single "Terminated" column, and adds per-column hide controls plus a "Restore all columns" button.

Specific changes:
- On first load (no saved preferences), every workflow column is visible, including Terminated.
- Shipped, Deferred, and Abandoned cards are co-located in one "Terminated" column instead of three separate columns.
- Each card in the Terminated column renders a small state badge ("Shipped", "Deferred", "Abandoned") using distinct colors — Shipped is visually prominent (green), while Deferred and Abandoned use muted, distinguishable tones.
- Each column header includes a hide control (icon button). Clicking it collapses that column without affecting others.
- A "Restore all columns" button appears whenever one or more columns are hidden; clicking it restores all hidden columns at once.
- Column visibility is persisted in localStorage so the layout survives a page refresh.
